name: Pork Chop Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in an electric skillet.
2. Add the pork chops and brown slowly on both sides.
3. Remove the pork chops from the skillet and add the onion. Sauté until tender.
4. Return the pork chops to the skillet. Add the tomato sauce, spaghetti sauce mix, and water. Mix well.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 45 to 55 minutes or until the pork chops are tender. If the sauce is too thick, add more water.
6. Stir in the grated parmesan cheese.
7. Prepare the spaghetti according to package directions and drain.
8. Arrange the cooked spaghetti and pork chops on a serving platter.
9. Spoon the sauce over everything.
10. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella cheese.
Serves 6.
